narrative.summary: New solo exhibition 'Naal-Naal' running March 6–May 1. Free admission. Gallery at 401 Richmond — Toronto's creative nerve centre. 4.9★ (23 reviews).

blocks.title: The Vibe
blocks.body:
⭐⭐⭐⭐ "The zine exhibit was impressive and thought-provoking. The cafe downstairs was also relaxing and the service was great. It was a little tricky navigating the building however I loved the gifts shops and the historic and artistic look of the building."

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ "This is a fantastic gallery that really pushes the stereotypes of the art experience -- tactile interactions, braille labels, and more. Highly recommend."

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ "Wheelchair accessible building.  Many studios, venues and offices in this building. Many wonderful art exhibits.  Artistic expression with accessibility and disability themes."
